Which capability is provided by Amazon SageMaker built-in algorithms rather than Amazon SageMaker automatic model tuning when you need to train models with built-in algorithms?
questions.explanation: Built-ins cover common ML tasks. Compare with Amazon SageMaker automatic model tuning: Tuning searches hyperparameter space.

questions.text: Which capability is provided by Amazon SageMaker automatic model tuning rather than SageMaker distributed training when you need to hyperparameter tuning jobs?
questions.explanation: Tuning searches hyperparameter space. Compare with SageMaker distributed training: Distributed jobs scale training.

questions.text: Which capability is provided by SageMaker distributed training rather than Amazon SageMaker Feature Store when you need to distributed training on GPU clusters?
questions.explanation: Distributed jobs scale training. Compare with Amazon SageMaker Feature Store: Feature Store shares features across teams.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to deploy real-time inference endpoints?
questions.explanation: Endpoints host models for low-latency inference.

questions.text: Which AWS service or feature is BEST to detect model drift?
questions.explanation: Model Monitor tracks data and quality drift.
